/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rendering-pipeline.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/rendering-pipeline.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rendering-pipeline.dir/src/geometry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rendering-pipeline.dir/src/scene.cpp.o" -o Debug/rendering-pipeline  -Wl,-rpath,/home/diogo/Documents/3D-2D-Renderer/rendering-pipeline/build/Debug Debug/libSDL3.so.0.5.0
